framework.name: ISO 10015:2019
framework.description: Quality management - Guidelines for competence management and people development. Provides guidelines for establishing, implementing, maintaining and improving systems for competence management and people development.
framework.verification_notes: Second correction pass 2026-03-28. Previous 'correction' still had wrong structure. Real ISO 10015:2019 has only Clauses 4-5 for substantive content (not 4-7). Rebuilt from actual standard PDF: Clause 4 (Competence management: 4.2, 4.2.1-4.2.3, 4.3), Clause 5 (Competence management and people development: 5.2-5.7). 13 concepts, all mapped to real clause numbers and titles.

concepts.definition_en: Clause 4 establishes guidelines for competence management: determining what competence the organization needs at organizational, team/group, and individual levels, and assessing current competence to identify development needs.
concepts.definition_nb: Klausul 4 etablerer retningslinjer for kompetansestyring: fastslå hvilken kompetanse organisasjonen trenger på organisasjons-, gruppe- og individnivå, og vurdere nåværende kompetanse for å identifisere utviklingsbehov.

concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for identifying the competence the organization needs to achieve its objectives and to fulfil applicable requirements. Competence needs are determined at three levels: organizational, team or group, and individual.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for å identifisere hvilken kompetanse organisasjonen trenger for å nå sine mål og oppfylle gjeldende krav. Kompetansebehov fastsettes på tre nivåer: organisasjons-, gruppe- og individnivå.

concepts.definition_en: Competence required by the organization as a whole to achieve its strategic objectives, implement its processes, and meet customer and regulatory requirements. Organizational competence includes the collective knowledge, skills, and capabilities needed across functions and levels.
concepts.definition_nb: Kompetanse som kreves av organisasjonen som helhet for å nå sine strategiske mål, implementere prosesser og oppfylle kunde- og regulatoriske krav.

concepts.definition_en: Competence required by teams or groups to perform their assigned processes and activities effectively. Team competence encompasses both individual contributions and the collective capability that emerges from collaboration, communication, and shared knowledge within the group.
concepts.definition_nb: Kompetanse som kreves av team eller grupper for å utføre tildelte prosesser og aktiviteter effektivt. Teamkompetanse omfatter både individuelle bidrag og den kollektive kapasiteten som oppstår gjennom samarbeid.

concepts.definition_en: Competence required by individuals to perform their assigned roles, tasks, and responsibilities. Individual competence includes the knowledge, skills, and behaviours needed to meet role requirements and performance expectations. Forms the basis for personal development planning.
concepts.definition_nb: Kompetanse som kreves av enkeltpersoner for å utføre tildelte roller, oppgaver og ansvarsområder. Individuell kompetanse inkluderer kunnskap, ferdigheter og atferd som kreves for å møte rollekrav.

concepts.name_en: Assessing Current Competence and Development Needs
concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for evaluating the current competence levels of the organization, teams/groups, and individuals, and comparing them against required competence to identify gaps. The assessment informs the planning and design of competence development activities.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for å vurdere nåværende kompetansenivåer i organisasjonen, team/grupper og enkeltpersoner, og sammenligne dem med nødvendig kompetanse for å identifisere gap.

concepts.definition_en: Clause 5 provides guidelines for planning, structuring, implementing, and evaluating competence management and people development programmes, including roles and responsibilities and determining future needs.
concepts.definition_nb: Klausul 5 gir retningslinjer for planlegging, strukturering, implementering og evaluering av programmer for kompetansestyring og personalutvikling, inkludert roller og ansvar og fastsettelse av fremtidige behov.

concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for planning competence management and people development programmes. Planning includes defining objectives, scope, resources, timelines, and success criteria aligned with organizational strategy and identified competence needs.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for planlegging av programmer for kompetansestyring og personalutvikling. Planlegging inkluderer fastsettelse av mål, omfang, ressurser, tidsplaner og suksesskriterier.

concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for designing the structure of competence development programmes. Structure includes selecting appropriate development methods (formal training, on-the-job learning, mentoring, coaching, e-learning), sequencing activities, and ensuring alignment between content and identified competence gaps.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for utforming av strukturen i kompetanseutviklingsprogrammer. Struktur inkluderer valg av passende utviklingsmetoder (formell opplæring, arbeidslæring, mentoring, coaching), sekvensering av aktiviteter.

concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for implementing competence development actions. Covers the execution of planned development activities, including delivery by internal or external providers, participant support, resource management, and ensuring a conducive learning environment.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for gjennomføring av kompetanseutviklingstiltak. Dekker gjennomføring av planlagte utviklingsaktiviteter, inkludert levering av interne eller eksterne leverandører og støtte til deltakere.

concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for defining and assigning roles and responsibilities in competence management and people development programmes. Covers the responsibilities of the organization, managers, individuals, and external providers throughout the competence development cycle.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for å definere og tildele roller og ansvar i programmer for kompetansestyring og personalutvikling.

concepts.name_en: Evaluating the Impact of a Competence Management and People Development Programme
concepts.name_nb: Evaluering av innvirkningen av et program for kompetansestyring og personalutvikling
concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for evaluating whether competence management and people development programmes have achieved their intended outcomes. Evaluation is conducted at organizational, team/group, or individual level and covers the impact on performance, quality, and achievement of objectives.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for å vurdere om programmer for kompetansestyring og personalutvikling har oppnådd sine tiltenkte resultater. Evaluering gjennomføres på organisasjons-, gruppe- eller individnivå.

concepts.name_en: Evaluating at an Organizational, Team, Group or Individual Level
concepts.name_nb: Evaluering på organisasjons-, team-, gruppe- eller individnivå
concepts.definition_en: Specific guidance on conducting evaluation at different levels: organizational impact (strategic goal achievement, quality improvement), team/group impact (collective performance, collaboration effectiveness), and individual impact (competence acquisition, behavioural change, job performance improvement).
concepts.definition_nb: Spesifikk veiledning om evaluering på ulike nivåer: organisasjonsmessig innvirkning (oppnåelse av strategiske mål, kvalitetsforbedring), gruppe-/teaminnvirkning og individuell innvirkning (kompetanseervervelse, atferdsendring).

concepts.name_en: Determining Future Competence and People Development Needs
concepts.definition_en: Guidelines for using evaluation outcomes and organisational context changes to identify future competence needs. Ensures that competence management is a continuous cycle: evaluation findings feed back into the next iteration of needs determination, planning, and programme design.
concepts.definition_nb: Retningslinjer for å bruke evalueringsresultater og endringer i organisasjonskontekst til å identifisere fremtidige kompetansebehov. Sikrer at kompetansestyring er en kontinuerlig syklus.
